{{CargoRelic
|name=First World Cup Ticket
|class_id=22016
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=07-30
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.07%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Jul 30, 1930 AD, the first World Cup was held at the Century Stadium in Uruguay.<br>The first World Cup was held in Uruguay. A total of 13 teams competed in the game. After the intense competition, US, Yugoslavia, Argentina, and Uruguay entered the semi-finals, and the grand final was Argentina versus Uruguay. Uruguay ended up winning the game with 4-2, becoming the first World Cup champion. The ticket, as the eyewitness of the event, was viewed as a precious collection.
|fame=45
|art=23
|fth=21
|civ=31
|tech=34
|ss1=Per 5 Orange Museum Promos, Snail ATK +1<br>Orange Museum Promos: 250/250
|ss2=Per 5 Orange Museum Promos, Snail ATK +2<br>Orange Museum Promos: 250/250
|ss3=Per 5 Orange Museum Promos, Snail ATK +3<br>Orange Museum Promos: 250/250
|ss4=Per 5 Orange Museum Promos, Snail ATK +5<br>Orange Museum Promos: 250/250
|ss7=Per 5 Orange Museum Promos, Snail ATK +5<br>Orange Museum Promos: 250/250<br>Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x White Card Drops +1%
}}
